settings.hero_subtitle: Hassle-free returns and exchanges — because getting it right matters more than making a sale.
settings.updated_text: Last Updated: 4 March 2026 · PAWD Australia Pty Ltd
settings.quick_summary: Quick Summary: 30-day returns · non-personalised items only · original condition required · customer pays return postage for change-of-mind · we cover return postage for faulty items · refunds within 2 business days of receiving return.

settings.title: Returns Overview
settings.body:
PAWD accepts returns on non-personalised items within 30 calendar days of the date your order was delivered. To be eligible for a return, items must be:
  • In original, unworn, and unused condition
  • In original packaging (box, tissue, ribbon)
  • Accompanied by a Return Merchandise Authorisation (RMA) number issued by our team
  • Returned within 30 days of the delivery date shown on your tracking
Items that do not meet the above conditions may be declined and returned to the sender at their expense.
Item TypeReturnable?Conditions
Standard products (non-personalised)✓ YesWithin 30 days, original condition
Sale items✓ YesSame 30-day policy applies
Personalised / engraved items✗ Final SaleUnless faulty or damaged
Faulty / damaged items✓ YesFull refund + prepaid return label
Incorrect items received✓ YesFull refund or replacement + prepaid label

settings.title: How to Start a Return
settings.body:
Step 1 — Contact Us
Email support@pawdstore.com with the subject line "Return Request — Order #[your order number]". Include your full name, order number, which item(s) you'd like to return, and your reason for return. We'll respond within 1 business day with your RMA number and return address.
Step 2 — Pack Your Return
Pack the item securely in its original packaging where possible. Write your RMA number clearly on the outside of the parcel. Do not send returns without an RMA number.
Step 3 — Ship It Back
For change-of-mind returns, return shipping is at your cost. We recommend using a tracked service. For faulty or incorrect items, we'll provide a prepaid return label via email.
Step 4 — Refund Processing
Once we receive and inspect your return (typically 1–2 business days after arrival), we'll process your refund within 2 business days and send a confirmation email.

settings.title: Exchanges
settings.body:
We're happy to exchange items for a different size, colour, or style within the 30-day return window. Contact us at support@pawdstore.com with your order number, the item you'd like to return, and your preferred exchange item. We'll confirm stock availability before you ship your return.
If the exchange item is higher in value, we'll send you a secure payment link for the difference. If lower, we'll refund the difference. Exchange orders are dispatched within 1–2 business days of receiving your return.

settings.title: Refunds
settings.body:
Approved refunds are issued to the original payment method only. Refund processing timeline:
  • We receive and inspect your return: 1–2 business days after delivery
  • We process the refund: within 2 business days of inspection
  • Refund appears in your account: 3–5 business days depending on your bank
  • Afterpay refunds: up to 10 business days
  • PayPal refunds: 3–5 business days
Original shipping fees are non-refundable for change-of-mind returns. Express shipping fees are non-refundable.

settings.title: Personalised Items
settings.body:
Personalised items — including engraved collars, custom tags, and any other made-to-order products — are final sale and cannot be returned for change of mind.
Before placing a personalised order, please:
  • Double-check the exact spelling of the name or text
  • Check capitalisation — we engrave exactly what you enter at checkout
  • Confirm the correct item, size and colour
If your personalised item arrives faulty, damaged, or with an engraving error made on our side, it is fully covered under our standard warranty.

settings.title: Faulty or Damaged Items
settings.body:
If your order arrives damaged, defective, or incorrect, please contact us at support@pawdstore.com within 7 days of delivery. Include your order number and clear photos of the fault or damage.
For faulty or incorrect items we will cover all return shipping costs and offer your choice of: (1) a full replacement dispatched within 1–2 business days, or (2) a full refund to your original payment method, including the original shipping cost.

settings.title: Warranty
settings.body:
All PAWD products carry a 12-month warranty against manufacturing defects from the date of purchase. A manufacturing defect is a fault in the materials or workmanship that causes the product to fail under normal use conditions.
Warranty covers: stitching failures, hardware failure (buckle, ring, clip), colour transfer defects, and structural integrity failures. Warranty does not cover: normal wear and tear, damage from chewing or scratching, damage from water immersion of leather products, accidental damage, or damage caused by misuse.
To make a warranty claim, email support@pawdstore.com with your order number and clear photos of the issue.

settings.title: Australian Consumer Law
settings.body:
Our returns policy is in addition to, and does not limit, your rights under the Australian Consumer Law (ACL). Under the ACL, consumers are entitled to a remedy if goods are not of acceptable quality, not fit for purpose, or do not match their description.
If a product has a major failure, you are entitled to your choice of refund, replacement, or repair. If a product has a minor failure, we may offer repair or replacement.
For enquiries regarding your consumer rights, contact the ACCC at accc.gov.au or your state's consumer protection agency.
